# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
def score(age, frequency, recency, size, cache_size, now):
    """Higher score = keep. Lower score = evict.
    Combines frequency (stable), inverse recency (temporal), and normalized age (churn/scan).
    """
    return 0.8 * frequency + (2.0 / (recency + 1)) - (age / (now + 2.0))
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
